task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the ServiceDesk Plus integration settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser is on the ServiceDesk Plus integration configuration page. The URL should contain 'manageEngine/integration' or the page header should indicate ServiceDesk Plus integration.

task_completion.description: Server Name and Port are entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Server Name input field contains 'sdp.corpnet.local' and the Port input field contains '8080'.
The Protocol dropdown or radio button is set to 'HTTP'.

task_completion.description: Authentication Key is entered and configuration is saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Authentication Key field contains '6A2F8D4E-91BC-43D7-A5E0-7C3B12F689D4'. The form is either fully filled out ready to be saved, or a success message is displayed indicating the integration was configured.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to localhost:8081 with the genuine ADAudit Plus UI, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web interface form being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Agent didn't just write the parameters in a notepad
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameters are entered into the actual input fields of the ADAudit Plus integration form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is 'http://localhost:8081' (or https). The correct login password is 'Admin@2024'. The integration settings page URL typically contains 'manageEngine/integration'. The required parameters are Server Name: 'sdp.corpnet.local', Port: '8080', Protocol: 'HTTP', and Authentication Key: '6A2F8D4E-91BC-43D7-A5E0-7C3B12F689D4'.
